message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
  ActorBorderColor Black
  ActorBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
  ParticipantBorderColor Black
  ParticipantBackgroundColor WhiteSmoke
}

actor "User Agent" as UserAgent
participant "Content Upload API" as ContentUploadAPI
database "Content database" as ContentDatabase
participant "CAFF Parser" as CAFFParser

UserAgent -> ContentUploadAPI: Upload request (HTTP POST),\ncontains a single CAFF file in its body.

note right of ContentUploadAPI: MUST also include a CSRF token to prevent users of other,\npotentially XSS vulnerable sites to take part in a massive distributed spam or DoS operation.

activate ContentUploadAPI
ContentUploadAPI -> CAFFParser: Validate upload request
activate CAFFParser
CAFFParser --> ContentUploadAPI: Return result
deactivate CAFFParser

alt [Failed to validate uploaded content]
    note right of CAFFParser: Uploads should be validated by at LEAST:\n* Content-Size header against max file size.\n* All size fields against their respective supported bounds.\n* Structure of all fields match expectations from the spec.\n* Number of bytes from the upload matches number of bytes expected from in-file metadata.
    ContentUploadAPI -->> UserAgent: Return an HTTP status code that signals validation failure.\nExact value depends on how the validation failed.
else [Request is deemed valid]
    ContentUploadAPI -> ContentDatabase: Store content in database
    activate ContentDatabase
    ContentDatabase --> ContentUploadAPI: Return result of request
    deactivate ContentDatabase
    
    alt [Upload succeeded]
        ContentUploadAPI -->> UserAgent: Return HTTP 201 Created
    else
        ContentUploadAPI -->> UserAgent: Return HTTP status code signaling the reason for failure.
    end
end
deactivate ContentUploadAPI

@enduml
```
